title: asclepias linaria
intro: Asclepias linaria, also known as the Antelope Horn Milkweed, is a species of flowering plant in the milkweed family (Apocynaceae), native to North America. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of various health issues due to its high content of cardenolides, a group of cardiac glycosides. The health benefits of Asclepias linaria include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate pain, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it a valuable herb for wound care and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Asclepias linaria can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and are often used in traditional medicine to support heart health and immune function.
